structured_payload_candidate.title: KDR-70N etc. Wired Controller Fault Codes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault codes for KDR-70N and similar models via wired controller: F1 room temp sensor, F2 indoor coil sensor (thin), F4 indoor coil sensor (thick), F5 high pressure, E3 indoor-outdoor communication, E1 three-phase error, E2 low pressure, E4 compressor overheat, E5 CT current abnormal, E6 outdoor ambient sensor, E7 outdoor coil sensor, EA outdoor suction sensor, ED outdoor exhaust sensor, EC mode mismatch, EE indoor E2 fault, F6 drainage, F7 indoor-wired controller communication.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Outdoor LED1 fault indication for KR-71/120W/(BP): flash 1 for defrost sensor, 2 for ambient sensor, 3 for suction sensor, 4 for AC overcurrent, 5 for DC undervoltage, 6 for IPM overcurrent, 10 for EEPROM, 12 for 857-808 chip communication, 13 for high pressure.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: Outdoor LED1 fault indication for KR-80/75/120W/BP when wired controller shows E9: flash 1 for defrost sensor, 2 for ambient sensor, 3 for suction sensor, 4 for exhaust sensor, 6 for AC overcurrent, 7 for DC undervoltage, 9 for IPM overcurrent, 10 for EEPROM, 11 for exhaust overheat, 12 for 857-808 chip communication, 13 for high pressure.
